buildspec.yml.general_idea: Add AWS Parameter Store variables for EKS deployment configuration.
buildspec.yml.after:
parameter-store:
    CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_DEPLOY_ENABLED: "CLOUDTRAIN_CODEBUILD_EKS_DEPLOY_ENABLED"
    CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_CLUSTER_NAME: "CLOUDTRAIN_CODEBUILD_EKS_CLUSTER_NAME"
    CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_INGRESS_HOST: "CLOUDTRAIN_CODEBUILD_EKS_INGRESS_HOST"
    CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_NAMESPACE: "CLOUDTRAIN_CODEBUILD_EKS_NAMESPACE"
    CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_CLUSTER_ROUTE: "CLOUDTRAIN_CODEBUILD_EKS_CLUSTER_ROUTE"

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Add Secrets Manager variables for Nexus, Harbor, and OIDC test credentials.
buildspec.yml.after:
secrets-manager:
    NEXUS_USER: "cloudtrain-codebuild-nexus:user"
    NEXUS_PASSWORD: "cloudtrain-codebuild-nexus:password"
    HARBOR_USER: "cloudtrain-codebuild-harbor:user"
    HARBOR_PASSWORD: "cloudtrain-codebuild-harbor:token"
    TEST_OIDC_CLIENT_CLIENT_ID: "cloudtrain-codebuild-common-test:test.oidc.client.clientId"
    TEST_OIDC_CLIENT_CLIENT_SECRET: "cloudtrain-codebuild-common-test:test.oidc.client.clientSecret"
    TEST_OIDC_CLIENT_ACCESS_TOKEN_URI: "cloudtrain-codebuild-common-test:test.oidc.client.accessTokenUri"
    TEST_OIDC_CLIENT_USER: "cloudtrain-codebuild-common-test:test.oidc.client.user"
    TEST_OIDC_CLIENT_PASSWORD: "cloudtrain-codebuild-common-test:test.oidc.client.password"

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Replace inline Helm installation script with a shared S3-hosted installation script.
buildspec.yml.before:
- echo "Install helm"
- curl -fsSL -o get_helm.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/helm/helm/main/scripts/get-helm-3
- chmod 700 get_helm.sh
- ./get_helm.sh
- helm version
buildspec.yml.after:
- echo "Running phase install"
- echo "Download and run common installation script"
- aws s3 cp s3://s3-eu-west-1-cloudtrain-codebuild-shared/cloudtrain-codebuild-install.sh ~/ 
- chmod u+x ~/cloudtrain-codebuild-install.sh
- ~/cloudtrain-codebuild-install.sh

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Remove hardcoded EKS authentication and role assumption from pre_build phase.
buildspec.yml.before:
- echo "Authenticate on EKS"
- aws eks update-kubeconfig --name $CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_CLUSTER_NAME --role $CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_ROLE_ARN
- kubectl cluster-info

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Introduce BRANCH variable and update Maven build commands to use it.
buildspec.yml.after:
- export BRANCH=main
- mvn clean install -f pom.xml -B -ff -e -V -U -P commit-stage -Dchangelist=.$BRANCH -Dsha1=.${CODEBUILD_RESOLVED_SOURCE_VERSION:0:8} -Dsonar.login=$SONARQUBE_TOKEN

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Wrap integration test stage in a conditional block based on EKS deployment flag.
buildspec.yml.before:
- echo "Running integration-test-stage of the build"
- mvn clean verify -f pom.xml -B -ff -e -V -U -P integration-test-stage -Dchangelist=.main -Dsha1=.${CODEBUILD_RESOLVED_SOURCE_VERSION:0:8}
buildspec.yml.after:
if [ "$CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_DEPLOY_ENABLED" == "true" ]
then
  echo "Authenticate on EKS"
  aws eks update-kubeconfig --name $CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_CLUSTER_NAME
  kubectl cluster-info
  echo "Running integration-test-stage of the build"
  mvn clean verify -f pom.xml -B -ff -e -V -U -P integration-test-stage -Dchangelist=.$BRANCH -Dsha1=.${CODEBUILD_RESOLVED_SOURCE_VERSION:0:8} -Dk8s.cluster.route=$CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_CLUSTER_ROUTE -Dk8s.cluster.namespace=$CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_NAMESPACE -Dk8s.ingress.host=$CLOUDTRAIN_EKS_INGRESS_HOST
fi

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Add SonarQube cache path to the CodeBuild cache configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version is not updated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.7.x to 3.1.x to support Jakarta EE 9+ and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x relies on javax.servlet APIs which are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (used by Spring Boot 3.x); code using Spring Boot 2.x will not compile or run on Spring Boot 3.x without migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit Undertow starter dependency and Tomcat exclusion, reverting to default Tomcat.
Rename common test dependency artifact from cnj-common-test to cnj-common-test-core.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact ID is likely deprecated or removed in the new version of the common test library.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin version to 3.11.0.
Update Maven Surefire plugin version to 3.2.1.
Update Maven Failsafe plugin version to 3.2.1.
Update Maven Docker plugin version to 0.43.4.
Update Maven Compose plugin version to 5.0.0.
Update Maven Helm plugin version to 5.0.0.
Update JUnit version to 5.9.3.
Update RestAssured version to 5.2.1.
Update Logstash Logback Encoder version to 7.3.
Remove SLF4J version property as it is likely managed by Spring Boot BOM.
Add filtering to main resources directory.
Add Helm resource copying execution to build process.
Add Helm lint execution to verify profile.
Refactor Docker plugin configuration to use global configuration instead of per-execution.
Add Helm package and push executions to deploy profile.
Update integration test profile to pull and install Helm charts from registry.
Add plugin repositories for custom Maven plugins.
Add repositories for dependencies.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from Eclipse Temurin 17 to a custom Java 21 Alpine image to align with the JDK 21 migration.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application is compiled for Java 21 and will fail to start or encounter class version errors if run on a Java 17 runtime.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the default Spring Boot active profile from 'default' to 'cloud' in the Docker environment.

src/main/helm/cnj-hello-backend-spring/t.general_idea: Refactored the Helm ingress template to support both NGINX and Traefik ingress controllers by replacing the generic 'default' type with specific conditional blocks for each.
Added NGINX-specific annotations for path rewriting and prefix forwarding when the path type is 'Prefix'.
Updated the NGINX ingress path definition to use a regex pattern for capturing groups when the path type is 'Prefix', enabling proper rewrite functionality.
Added a complete Traefik IngressRoute and Middleware configuration block to support Traefik as an ingress controller option.
src/main/helm/cnj-hello-backend-spring/t.after:
{{- if eq .Values.ingress.type "traefik" -}}
---
apiVersion: traefik.containo.us/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute

src/main/helm/cnj-hello-backend-spring/v.general_idea: Switch the Kubernetes ingress controller configuration from Traefik to NGINX.

src/test/docker/cnj-hello-backend-spring.general_idea: Remove the deprecated 'version' field from the Docker Compose file to align with modern Docker Compose specifications.

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Update import path for the RestAssured test fixture to match the new package structure.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: The old import path 'group.msg.at.cloud.common.test.adapter.rest.RestAssuredSystemTestFixture' no longer exists, causing a compilation error.

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Replace Hamcrest matcher with AssertJ assertions for response validation.
Add import for the Message entity class used in the new test logic.
Refactor test to deserialize response into a Message object and validate fields using AssertJ.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.before: given().get("api/v1/hello").then().assertThat().statusCode(200).contentType(ContentType.JSON).body("text", response -> startsWith("Welcome to Cloud Native Java with "));
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.after: Message welcomeMessage = given().get("api/v1/hello").then().assertThat().statusCode(200).contentType(ContentType.JSON).extract().as(Message.class); assertThat(welcomeMessage).as("GET must return non-null response").isNotNull(); assertThat(welcomeMessage.getId()).as("message.id must not be empty").isNotNull(); assertThat(welcomeMessage.getCode()).as("message.code must not be empty").isNotNull(); assertThat(welcomeMessage.getText()).as("message.text must not be empty").isNotNull(); assertThat(welcomeMessage.getLocale()).as("message.locale must not be empty").isNotNull();

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Remove explicit public modifier from test method to follow modern JUnit 5 conventions.

src/test/resources/logback-test.xml.general_idea: Updated the logback test logging pattern to match the standard Spring Boot format.
